name: MLT
subtitle: Passive Multiples
description: MLT is a passive utility module for distributing signals within your patch. The inputs cascade downward, providing up to thirty one outputs of a single input, or up to eight separate multiples with three outputs. MLT is offered as a Fully Assembled module, Partial DIY Kit (PCB & Panel Only) or a Full DIY Kit (all components included.) Learn more about MLT on our documentation website!
